holdings.infoBox: BUG is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fortinet stock at 8.31%, Okta, Inc. at 7.52%, Palo Alto Networks at 7.44%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 7.29%, and Akamai Technologies at 6.11%.

overview.description: The Global X Cybersecurity ETF (BUG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Cybersecurity index, a modified market-cap-weighted global index of companies selected on the basis of revenue related to cybersecurity activities. BUG was launched on Oct 25, 2019 and is issued by Global X.

data.text: The WSJ Pro Cyber Index of top 20 public cybersecurity firms by market capitalization ended 2025 up more than 27%. But that's down from highs twice as big earlier in the year.
